title: RTX ON AETHER
description: An astonishing collaboration between the Aether mod and RTX ON. This will majorly enhance your Aether experience!
body: This mod is unlike any other as it enhances your Aether experience by introducing many graphical changes to the mod such as physics mod, iris mod, sodium mod, and way more! You can even play this game in VR to get the maximum Aether experience. The Aether mod is magnificent as it introduces a wide range of new things, from floating islands to flying pigs. This is the modpack you do not want to miss. This mod can achieve a massive amount of FPS despite the massive increase in graphics, so what are you waiting for? Get out there and explore the newly enhanced RTX ON Aether mod.
